use_cases: Generative spiral animation using the golden angle (Fibonacci) to distribute hundreds of pulsing dots in an organic spiral pattern
Decorative background element for hero sections, landing pages, or portfolio showcases
Loading state visualization with mesmerizing ambient animation instead of traditional spinners
Ambient background for creative dashboards or tech product pages to add visual interest
ai_summary: A generative spiral animation component that creates a Fibonacci-based distribution of dots using the golden angle. The component renders dots in a perfect logarithmic spiral pattern with staggered pulsing radius animations, creating an organic, breathing effect. Commonly used as a modern loading indicator or decorative background element in creative and SaaS applications.
